text:
Market today: Sentiment is cracking in chip and tech land. Multiple headlines are flagging bubble risk and chip bull market fatigue — exactly the sector you're 90% in. Margin amplifies every downtick, so this mood matters more for you than for a cash trader.

Your holdings: PLTR (-12.55%) is on SELL — you're already underwater and the scanner says act. AVGO (-12.84%) is your largest position on TRIM — biggest dollar risk in the book, needs a hard look at sizing today. PTNM (-15.25%) is a tiny spec already deep in the red with a stop at $9.50 just below current price — one bad tick and you're out. SPCX is brand-new, very volatile IPO with limited price history; margin makes this especially dangerous if it gaps down.

Watch: 1) Does chip sentiment get worse — SMH holding $611 is your canary. 2) AVGO price action around $336 stop — that's your biggest margin exposure.

Bottom line: Your two biggest problems are PLTR and AVGO — both underwater, both flagged — deal with those before worrying about anything else.
